activate.title: Activate Site Plan
activate.description: Upload a site layout and link zones to buildings — visitors will be able to click on zones to navigate to the desired building.
activate.hint: Activating the site plan does not affect existing apartments or floor plans.

deactivate.title: Deactivate Site Plan
deactivate.description: The site plan map will be hidden from the public widget. Apartments and floor plans will remain unchanged.
deactivate.warning: The site plan will be hidden from visitors. You can reactivate it at any time.

editor.title: Site plan
editor.selectSubProjectFirst: Select a building before saving the zone
editor.drawHint: Click to add points, then save the zone

infraZones.title: Objects on site plan
infraZones.name: Name
infraZones.selectEntityFirst: Select a building or object before saving the zone

subProjects.title: Buildings
subProjects.name: Name
subProjects.addApartmentsDesc: Choose how to add apartments to this building
